lessons.title: Plan and design the integration of enterprise apps for SSO
lessons.content_md:
Enterprise app deployment enables control over which users can access the apps, easily log into apps with single-sign-on, and provide integrated usage reports.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-design-integration-of-enterprise-apps-for-sso/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and design the integration of enterprise apps for SSO

lessons.title: Implement and monitor the integration of enterprise apps for SSO
lessons.content_md:
Deploying and monitoring enterprise applications to Azure solutions can ensure security. Explore how to deploy on-premises and cloud based apps to users.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-monitor-integration-of-enterprise-apps-for-sso/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement and monitor the integration of enterprise apps for SSO

lessons.title: Implement app registration
lessons.content_md:
Line of business developed in-house need registration in Microsoft Entra ID and assigned to users for a secure Azure solution. Explore how to implement app registration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-app-registration/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Register apps using Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
In this module, we explore the process of creating an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID. Then explore the settings and configuration options. You create a single page app, register multitenant app, and other options. As part of this process, we dig into granting user access to apps and configure how and when they can use the app and its data.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/register-apps-use-microsoft-entra-id/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Register apps using Microsoft Entra ID

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement access management for apps
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement access management for apps**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
